holdings.infoBox: DIVS is an equity ETF with a total of 37 individual holdings. The top holdings are Cisco Systems stock at 4.36%, Texas Instruments at 4.28%, Broadcom at 3.58%, Publicis Groupe at 3.34%, and Taiwan Semiconductor Manufacturing Company at 3.31%.

overview.description: The Guinness Atkinson Dividend Builder ETF (DIVS) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in total market equity. The fund is an actively-managed portfolio of dividend-paying companies from both developed and emerging markets. The fund seeks income and consistent dividend growth. DIVS was launched on Mar 30, 2012 and is issued by Guinness Atkinson.
